recommendations.title: The Sacrifice
recommendations.overview: Alexander, a journalist, philosopher and retired actor, celebrates a birthday with friends and family when it is announced that nuclear war has begun.

recommendations.title: Mirror
recommendations.overview: A dying man in his forties recalls his childhood, his mother, the war and personal moments that tell of and juxtapose pivotal moments in Soviet history with daily life.

recommendations.title: Stalker

recommendations.title: Ivan's Childhood
recommendations.overview: In WW2, twelve year old Soviet orphan Ivan Bondarev works for the Soviet army as a scout behind the German lines and strikes a friendship with three sympathetic Soviet officers.

recommendations.title: Solaris
recommendations.overview: A troubled psychologist is sent to investigate the crew of an isolated research station orbiting a bizarre planet.

recommendations.title: The Killers
recommendations.overview: The Killers is a 1956 student film by the Soviet and Russian film director Andrei Tarkovsky and his fellow students Marika Beiku and Aleksandr Gordon. The film is based on the short story "The Killers" by Ernest Hemingway, written in 1927. It was Tar
recommendations.director: Marika Beiku, Aleksandr Gordon, Andrei Tarkovsky

recommendations.title: The Steamroller and the Violin

recommendations.title: Andrei Rublev

recommendations.title: Nostalgia
